Notice Of Defendant Mt. Diablo Unified School District'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William B. Rowell of Crosby & Rowell, LLP, 510-267-0300, appearing for defendant and moving party
Scott Hames of Keller Fishback, 775-1206, appearing for plaintiffs and responding parties

Argued and the Court modified its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT MT. DIABLO UNIFIED SCHOOL DISTRICT'S Demurrer To Plaintiffs' Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. Government Code 945.4. Failure to present claim before bringing suit is not cured by presenting claim after suit is brought, even if before suit is served. This action could never have been brought after presentation of claim. Plaintiff will have to proceed with new action making appropriate allegations of compliance with Tort Claims Act. Case not barred by statute of limitations. CCP 340.2. Order signed in open Court. (301/PJB/PM) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
